center.name: 基伍湖
center.summary: 基伍湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Albertine owlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There has also been a sight record from Kahuzi-Biéga National Park, west of Lake Kivu in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Albertine owlet occurs in very open montane forest and its ecotone where there are many clearings and a dense undergrowth

links.label: 分布于
